overview: Skeleton Champion is a SubBoss-class Undead monster found in Crypt, Goblin Cave, Ice Cavern, Inferno, Ruins, Ship Graveyard. 3 grades: Common, Elite, Nightmare. Base stats (Common): 650 HP, 28 physical damage, 200 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 999, MaxImpactEndurance 999. 6 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Combo 2 1 at 120% ratio (336 base damage). Sight range 1000, combat radius 170.

phases.name: Melee Combat
phases.description: 4 melee attacks. Combo 2 1 (120%), Combo 2 2 (120%), Combo 3 1 (100%), and more.

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

strategies.title: High Impact Values (ImpactRes 999, Endurance 999)
strategies.description: ImpactResistance 999 and MaxImpactEndurance 999. This monster does not have a Staggered ability in its ability set.

strategies.title: Elemental Weaknesses: Fire, Divine
strategies.description: Significant elemental weaknesses: Fire (-2000), Divine (-1500). Negative reduction values mean incoming damage of that type is amplified.

strategies.title: Resists: Dark, Evil
strategies.description: Elemental resistances: Dark (+500), Evil (+500). Positive reduction values reduce incoming damage of that type.

strategies.title: Projectile Reduction: 200
strategies.description: Has 200 ProjectileReductionMod, reducing physical projectile damage.

strategies.title: Detection Range: 1000 units
strategies.description: Sight radius 1000 units, loses target at 1500 units, 180° vision angle.

strategies.title: Combat Range: combat area radius 170, ability check distance 220
strategies.description: Combat area radius 170. Ability check distance 220.

elite_differences: ActionSpeed 0 → 300 in Elite — attacks animate faster
ActionSpeed 0 → 300 in Nightmare — attacks animate faster

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
ai_perception.stuck_description: Has stuck-detection failsafes in behavior tree.
ai_perception.sight_description: Detects targets within 1000 units. Loses target at 1500 units.
